tweet.text: Had an amazing afternoon at Adobe’s corporate office to kick off the Golden State Warriors NBA season! 🎉🏀 The vibe was incredible, and of course, everyone was repping Dub Nation! Let’s go Warriors! 💙💛 #DubNation #WarriorsGround #AdobeEvents #NBASeasonKickoff https://t.co/wCeKCsQ65n

A big thank you to Ticketmaster’s corporate team for celebrating the kickoff of the Golden State Warriors season! Can’t wait to root for our Dubs together. Warriors! 🏀💙💛 #DubNation #WarriorsSeason #WarriorsGround #Ticketmaster https://t.co/MwZ7k3r8hH

No better way to gear up for the Warriors’ upcoming season than with the one and only Franco Finn! We had the best afternoon with everyone at the Chase Center Corporate Offices. Let’s go, Dub Nation! 🏀💙💛 #WarriorsGround #DubNation #ChaseCenter #Warriors https://t.co/nR3BqCaAuy
